title: Torenia viscosa
taxonomy: Torenia viscosa is a species of flowering plant in the family Linderniaceae. It belongs to the genus Torenia, which is a group of flowering plants. The genus Torenia is a part of the order Lamiales, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants. The family Linderniaceae is a small family of flowering plants that is commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The exact classification of Torenia viscosa may vary depending on the source, but it is generally classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Linderniaceae.

intro: Torenia viscosa, also known as Blue Skyflower, is a plant species native to tropical Asia, belonging to the family Linderniaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its health benefits.
